description: Steel is a cloud browser infrastructure platform for AI agents and automation developers. It lets you launch and control remote browser sessions, scrape content, manage files/profiles/credentials, and connect automation frameworks like Playwright or Puppeteer.
summary: Steel exposes a REST API at `https://api.steel.dev/v1`, a CDP-over-WebSocket browser connection at `wss://connect.steel.dev`, and a `steel` CLI; all use a Steel API key.
